Thanks Dan!

You have completed the Project Assessment & Prep.We’re looking forward to showing you what we can do for your company. A member of our sales team will be in touch soon, but if you have any questions, feel free to shoot us a message at sales@electricoctopus.agency

Tech

What to Expect

Before your call with Electric Octopus, we've designed a streamlined process to ensure you get maximum value from our conversation and beyond. Here's exactly what happens next:

Before the call

Our BDR team prepares to make your strategy session as productive as possible.

  • Calendar invite with meeting details
  • Quick questionnaire about your goals
  • Industry-specific research Initial resources and case studies

During Your Call

Your 60 minute strategy session is focused entirely on your business needs.

  • Assessment of your growth opportunities
  • Relevant success stories
  • Strategic service recommendations
  • Actionable insights to implement now

After Your Call

We both see a fit, we'll follow up with a tailored proposal and action plan.

  • Detailed summary within 72 hours
  • Custom proposal with clear price break down & timeline
  • Strategic services recommendation
  • Follow-up to answer any questions

Trusted by growth-obsessed brands

Trusted by enterprises for mission-critical growth since 2012

Problems we solve

The Modern B2B Challenge: Fragmented Systems & Lost Opportunities

  • Missed revenue opportunities from inadequate prospect targeting and engagement
  • Database preparation (1,000 contacts)
  • Database preparation (1,000 contacts)

Our multi-channel prospecting strategies combine precision targeting with personalized engagement to connect with decision-makers who are ready to buy.

Frequently Asked Questions

Here Are The Questions Brands Ask Us Before Working With Us

Whether you're exploring a website revamp, automation, or a full marketing system — these answers will give you clarity on how we work, what we deliver, and how we help businesses scale without guesswork.

We are a full-stack Martech & product engineering agency. Our core services include:

  • Web Design & UX/UI
  • Web & App Development
  • SEO & Performance Optimization
  • Marketing Automation & CRM Integrations
  • Branding & Creative Design
  • Content & Funnel Strategy
  • AI-powered workflows & data dashboards

In short — we help brands build digital systems that attract, convert, and retain customers.

If you’re unsure, start with a Strategy Call. We’ll audit your current tech stack, website, and funnel, then recommend the exact services needed to hit your revenue goals — no fluff, just what moves the needle.

Pricing depends on scope and complexity.  Typical ranges:

  • Conversion-focused website: 3–8 weeks
  • SEO + content systems: monthly retainers
  • Automation/CRM setups: project-based
  • Full growth stack: custom

We’ll give you a transparent estimate before starting.

Yes. Many clients start with a landing page, audit, or SEO sprint before scaling into branding, automation, or full development.

Web and UX improvements show impact immediately after go-live.  SEO &amp; automation typically begin generating measurable improvements within 30–90 days. Full growth systems compound over time.

We work with funded startups, growth-stage brands, and enterprise teams. If you have a clear offer and a market to serve, we can build your digital engine

Most agencies deliver assets — we deliver systems.  Design + tech + content + automation = a revenue engine you own.  No vanity metrics. No templates. Just measurable growth.

Absolutely. We offer monthly optimization, maintenance, analytics, and continuous upgrades so your digital ecosystem stays fast, secure, and conversion-optimized.

Bridging the gap between marketing innovation and measurable business impact.

We have cookies!

We use cookies on our website to give you the most relevant experience by remembering your preferences and repeat visits. By clicking “Accept”, you consent to the use of all the cookies. However, you may visit Cookie settings to provide a controlled consent.
